hero_sub: Expert haircuts, colour, extensions and beauty treatments for Croydon clients

services.title: Hair Cutting & Styling
services.body: Precision cuts, blow‑dry, and personalised styling for any occasion

services.title: Colour & Highlights
services.body: Professional dyeing, balayage, and root touch‑ups using premium pigments

services.title: Facial & Skincare Treatments
services.body: Deep cleansing, micro‑needling, and tailored facial therapies for radiant skin

about: Ashnaa Hair & Beauty offers hair styling, colour, and beauty treatments in Croydon. Clients appreciate the friendly staff and convenient location, and you can reach them at info@ashnaabeauty.co.uk

faq.q: What area does Ashnaa Hair & Beauty cover?
faq.a: Ashnaa Hair & Beauty is based in Croydon and welcomes clients from the surrounding Croydon neighbourhoods

faq.q: How can I book an appointment?
faq.a: Appointments can be booked by emailing info@ashnaabeauty.co.uk or by calling the salon directly

faq.q: What should I expect on my first visit?
faq.a: On your first visit you will be greeted, offered a brief consultation about the service you want, and then the treatment will be carried out. The salon holds a 4.1‑star rating on Google from 321 reviews, reflecting consistent client satisfaction
